chunk: BYD Pakistan RAG Assistant source PDF - verify changing prices/specs with official dealer Page 1 BYD ATTO 2 Pakistan Information Purpose: This PDF is prepared as a source document for your BYD Pakistan RAG chatbot project. Important: Prices and specifications can change. Verify final details with official BYD Pakistan dealer before making decisions. BYD ATTO 2 is a fully electric compact SUV available in Pakistan. It is part of BYD's ATTO lineup and is positioned as a smaller and more affordable electric SUV compared with BYD ATTO 3. Basic information - Vehicle type: Electric SUV / crossover. - Fuel type: Electric. - Variant in Pakistan: BYD ATTO 2 Premium. - Best use case: City driving, daily commuting, small families, and

buyers who want an affordable BYD electric SUV in Pakistan. Price in Pakistan - BYD ATTO 2 Premium price in Pakistan: PKR 7,290,000 ex-factory. - Ex-factory price does not include freight, taxes, registration, insurance, or documentation charges. - Prices may change over time and should be verified with an official BYD Pakistan dealer. Drive, transmission, power, and performance - Drive type: Commonly listed as front-wheel drive in Pakistan-related sources, but official BYD Pakistan page should be checked for final confirmation. - Transmission: Automatic single-speed EV transmission. - Electric motor power: 174 hp. - Acceleration: 0 to 100 km/h in about 7.9 seconds. - Top speed: 160 km/h. Battery, range, and charging - Battery: 45.12 kWh BYD Blade Battery. - Range:

Up to 380 km NEDC driving range. - Fast charging: BYD Pakistan states 30% to 80% charging in about 30 minutes using supported fast charging. - Normal charging time: Around 8 hours according to PakWheels data. Dimensions and capacity - Seating capacity: 5 persons. - Length: 4310 mm. - Width: 1830 mm. - Height: 1675 mm. - Wheelbase: 2620 mm. - Ground clearance: 150 mm. - Kerb weight: 1550 kg. BYD Pakistan RAG Assistant source PDF - verify changing prices/specs with official dealer Page 2 - Doors: 5. - Boot space: 380 litres normally; up to 1320 litres with rear seats folded. Tyres, wheels, and colors - Tyre size: 215/60/R17. - Wheel size: 17 inches. - Wheel type: Alloy wheels.

- Available colors in Pakistan: Ski White, Harbour Grey, Cosmos Black. Exterior features - LED headlights. - Daytime running lights. - Rear spoiler. - Roof rails. - Alloy wheels. - Body-colored outside door handles. - Side mirrors with indicators. - Rain-sensing wipers. - Auto-retractable side mirrors. - Heated side mirrors. - Panoramic sunroof. - Continuous rear tail light design inspired by a Mobius ring. Interior and comfort features - Leather seats with powered adjustment. - Electronic driver seat adjustment. - Electronic passenger seat adjustment. - Digital instrument cluster. - 12.8-inch standard LCD display. - 8 speakers. - Bluetooth connectivity. - USB support. - Apple CarPlay. - Android Auto. - Wireless charger. - Smart keyless entry. - Push start. - Ambient

lighting. - Power windows. BYD Pakistan RAG Assistant source PDF - verify changing prices/specs with official dealer Page 3 - Power mirrors. - Power steering. - Single-zone climate control. - Rear AC vents. - Cruise control. - Adaptive cruise control. - Auto brake hold. - Driving modes. - 360-degree camera. - Front and rear parking sensors. - Rear camera. - Front camera. Technology and safety - NFC keyless entry using a card or phone. - Vehicle-to-Load function, also called V2L. - V2L allows the car battery to power external devices. - Comprehensive driving assistant system. - Anti-lock braking system. - Electronic brake-force distribution. - Brake assist. - Traction control. - Vehicle stability control. - Lane keep assist. - Lane departure

warning. - Blind spot detection. - Rear cross traffic alert. - Rear cross traffic brake. - Hill start assist. - Downhill assist. - Surround view monitor. - Parking distance warning. - Door opening warning. - Speed sensing auto door lock. - Crash auto door unlock. - Child lock. - ISOFIX child seat anchors. - Driver attention warning. BYD Pakistan RAG Assistant source PDF - verify changing prices/specs with official dealer Page 4 - Anti-theft alarm. - Immobilizer. - Autonomous emergency braking. - Collision detection. - Airbags are available; PakWheels FAQ mentions 6 airbags for ATTO 2 Premium. Main strengths and limitations - Strengths: Affordable BYD EV option in Pakistan; compact SUV size; good electric range for daily use; Blade Battery

safety; modern features such as wireless charging, V2L, 360 camera, and driver assistance. - Limitations: Smaller than ATTO 3; charging infrastructure in Pakistan is still developing; official price and availability can change; drive type should be verified from BYD Pakistan dealer.

BYD Pakistan RAG Assistant source PDF - verify changing prices/specs with official dealer Page 1 BYD ATTO 3 Pakistan Information Purpose: This PDF is prepared as a source document for your BYD Pakistan RAG chatbot project. Important: Prices and specifications can change. Verify final details with official BYD Pakistan dealer before making decisions. BYD ATTO 3 is a fully electric compact SUV / crossover available in Pakistan. It is larger than BYD ATTO 2 and offers more space, more power, and a more premium interior. Basic information - Vehicle type: Electric compact SUV / crossover. - Fuel type: Electric. - Variant in Pakistan: BYD ATTO 3 Advance. - Best use case: Families, urban commuting, inter-city travel, and buyers who want

a more spacious electric SUV than ATTO 2. Price in Pakistan - BYD ATTO 3 Advance price in Pakistan: PKR 8,990,000 ex-factory. - Ex-factory price does not include freight, taxes, registration, insurance, or documentation charges. - Prices may change over time and should be verified with an official BYD Pakistan dealer. Drive, transmission, power, and performance - Drive type: Generally known as a front-wheel-drive electric SUV with a front-mounted motor; final confirmation should be taken from official BYD Pakistan dealer. - Transmission: Automatic single-speed EV transmission. - Electric motor power: 201 hp. - Torque: International ATTO 3 specifications commonly mention 310 Nm torque, but Pakistan pages may not show torque clearly. - Acceleration: 0 to 100 km/h in about 7.9

seconds according to BYD Pakistan; some sources mention around 7.3 seconds depending on market and specification. - Top speed: 160 km/h. Battery, range, and charging - Battery: 49.92 kWh BYD Blade Battery in the Pakistan-listed version. - Range: Up to 410 km driving range. - Normal charging time: Around 9 hours. - Fast charging: BYD Pakistan states 30% to 80% charging in about 30 minutes using supported fast charging. Dimensions and capacity - Seating capacity: 5 persons. - Length: 4455 mm. - Width: 1875 mm. - Height: 1615 mm. BYD Pakistan RAG Assistant source PDF - verify changing prices/specs with official dealer Page 1 BYD Seal Pakistan Information Purpose: This PDF is prepared as a source document for your BYD Pakistan RAG chatbot project. Important: Prices and specifications can change. Verify final details with official BYD Pakistan dealer before making decisions. BYD Seal is a fully electric sedan available in Pakistan. It is a premium electric sedan focused on luxury, performance, technology, and long driving range. Basic information - Vehicle type: Electric sedan. - Fuel type: Electric. - Variants in Pakistan: BYD Seal Dynamic and BYD Seal Premium. BYD Seal Performance may also be referenced in some listings. - Best use case: Buyers who want a premium electric sedan

with long range, strong performance, advanced technology, and luxury comfort. Price in Pakistan - BYD Seal Dynamic price: PKR 14,790,000 ex-factory. - BYD Seal Premium price: PKR 16,990,000 ex-factory. - Overall Seal price range: Around PKR 1.48 crore to PKR 1.70 crore. - Ex-factory price does not include freight, taxes, registration, insurance, or documentation charges. - Prices may change over time and should be verified with an official BYD Pakistan dealer. Drive, transmission, power, and performance - Drive type: BYD Seal is generally sold internationally with rear-wheel-drive variants and an all-wheel-drive performance variant. - Dynamic and Premium are generally associated with RWD in many BYD Seal markets, while Performance is associated with AWD. - Final drive layout should be confirmed

from an official BYD Pakistan dealer. - Transmission: Automatic single-speed EV transmission. - Dynamic variant: 201 hp. - Premium variant: 280 hp. - Overall Seal range listed by PakWheels: 201 hp to 523 hp depending on variant. - Acceleration: BYD Pakistan main page lists 0 to 100 km/h as fast as 5.9 seconds. BYD Pakistan Blade Battery section also mentions 0 to 100 km/h within 3.8 seconds, likely referring to a higher performance configuration. - Top speed: 220 km/h according to PakWheels. Battery, range, and charging - Battery: BYD Pakistan lists battery capacity up to 82.56 kWh. - PakWheels lists battery capacity range as 61 kWh to 82 kWh depending on variant. - BYD Seal uses BYD Blade Battery technology.

- Range: BYD Pakistan lists up to 650 km driving range. BYD Pakistan RAG Assistant source PDF - verify changing prices/specs with official dealer Page 2 - PakWheels lists range from 510 km to 650 km depending on variant. - Fast charging: BYD Pakistan states 30% to 80% charging in about 30 minutes using supported DC fast charging. - Normal charging time: Around 10 hours according to PakWheels data. Dimensions and capacity - Seating capacity: 5 persons. - Length: 4800 mm. - Width: 1875 mm. - Height: 1460 mm. - Ground clearance: 145 mm. - Kerb weight: 1922 kg. - Boot space: 400 litres. - Tyre size: 225/50/R18. Colors - Available colors in Pakistan: Aurora White, Cosmos Black. Exterior design

- Ocean-inspired design. - Luxurious, sporty, and powerful appearance. - Aerodynamic sedan shape. - LED lighting. - Silver-plated panoramic glass roof. - Modern premium sedan styling. Interior and comfort features - Premium electric sedan cabin. - Advanced intelligent cockpit. - Head-up display. - Ventilation functions. - Memory seat functions. - Electric seat adjustment. - Panoramic glass roof. - Climate control. - Power windows. - Power mirrors. - Power steering. - Digital instrument cluster. - Infotainment system. BYD Pakistan RAG Assistant source PDF - verify changing prices/specs with official dealer Page 3 - Apple CarPlay. - Android Auto. - Bluetooth connectivity. - Rear camera. - 360-degree camera depending on variant. - Front and rear parking sensors. - Ambient lighting. - Adaptive

cruise control. - Smart driving features. Technology and safety - BYD Blade Battery. - e-Platform 3.0. - Cell-to-body technology is associated with BYD Seal in several BYD markets. - Advanced driver assistance system. - Head-up display. - Advanced intelligent cockpit. - Multi-sensor safety layout. - Fast DC charging support. - Premium EV performance tuning. - 7 airbags. - Predictive collision warning. - Driver attention warning. - Traffic sign recognition. - Tyre repair kit. - Adaptive cruise control. - Lane keeping assist. - Blind spot monitoring. - Advanced driver assistance system. - Intelligent driving systems. - Anti-lock braking system. - Electronic stability control. - Autonomous emergency braking. - Rear cross traffic alert. - ISOFIX child seat support. - Parking assistance features.

Main strengths and limitations BYD Pakistan RAG Assistant source PDF - verify changing prices/specs with official dealer Page 4 - Strengths: Longest electric range among ATTO 2, ATTO 3, Shark 6 electric-only, and Seal EV models; premium sedan design; strong performance; fast charging support; Blade Battery safety; advanced cockpit and safety features. - Limitations: More expensive than ATTO 2 and ATTO 3; lower ground clearance than SUVs and pickup trucks; charging infrastructure in Pakistan is still developing; actual range depends on speed, weather, AC use, road conditions, and driving style; variant details such as drive type should be confirmed with an official BYD Pakistan dealer.

BYD Pakistan RAG Assistant source PDF - verify changing prices/specs with official dealer Page 1 BYD Shark 6 Pakistan Information Purpose: This PDF is prepared as a source document for your BYD Pakistan RAG chatbot project. Important: Prices and specifications can change. Verify final details with official BYD Pakistan dealer before making decisions. BYD Shark 6 is a plug-in hybrid electric pickup truck available in Pakistan. It is designed as a powerful double cabin pickup with electric hybrid technology and off-road capability. Basic information - Vehicle type: Double cabin pickup truck. - Fuel type: PHEV, meaning Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle. - Variant in Pakistan: BYD Shark 6 Premium. - Best use case: Users who want a pickup truck with strong

performance, off-road ability, towing capacity, and hybrid efficiency. Price in Pakistan - BYD Shark 6 Premium price in Pakistan: Around PKR 19,950,000 ex-factory, also shown as around PKR 2.00 crore. - Ex-factory price does not include freight, taxes, registration, insurance, or documentation charges. - Prices may change over time and should be verified with an official BYD Pakistan dealer. Engine, hybrid system, power, and performance - Engine displacement: 1497 cc petrol engine. - Fuel tank: 60 litres. - Hybrid system: Plug-in hybrid system combining internal combustion engine with electric motor support. - Power: 436 hp combined. - Torque: 650 Nm combined. - Drive type: AWD with off-road capability. - Transmission: Automatic. - Acceleration: 0 to 100 km/h in about 5.7

seconds. - Top speed: 180 km/h. Range and charging - Electric range: 100 km NEDC according to BYD Pakistan. - Combined range: Up to 800 km combined range. - Range depends on petrol use, battery charge, load, speed, road conditions, and driving style. Dimensions and capacity - Seating capacity: 5 persons. - Length: 5457 mm. - Width: 1971 mm. - Height: 1925 mm. BYD Pakistan RAG Assistant source PDF - verify changing prices/specs with official dealer Page 2 - Wheelbase: 3260 mm. - Ground clearance: 230 mm. - Kerb weight: 2710 kg. - Doors: 4. - Cargo / boot space: 1200 litres according to PakWheels. - Tyre size: 265/65/R18. Colors - Available colors in Pakistan: Cosmos Black, Arctic White, Atlantis

Grey. Off-road capability and towing - AWD with off-road capability. - Driving modes include Mud, Snow, and Sand. - Approach angle: 31 degrees. - Departure angle: 19.3 degrees. - Ramp-over angle: 17 degrees. - Ground clearance: 230 mm. - Wading depth: 700 mm. - Towing capability: 2500 kg. - Vehicle Dynamic Control. - Hill Hold Control. - Hill Descent Control. - Trailer Stability Control. Platform and technology - Super Dual Mode Off-Road Platform. - Ladder frame chassis. - Off-road hybrid architecture. - High-performance chassis. - Electric Hybrid longitudinal EHS drive assembly. - Cell-to-chassis technology according to BYD Pakistan. - High-strength steel underbody protection plate. - Long travel double wishbone suspension. - Vehicle-to-Load function, also called V2L, which allows the vehicle

battery to power external devices. Exterior and interior features - Large pickup truck body. - Double cabin design. - Alloy wheels. - LED headlights.
